Midnight Archive

Editorial Policy

Every English story page should identify the source text, original author or traditional attribution, era, rights note, editorial mode, and review date. Pages without a source do not belong in the publication queue.

The English edition favors source-led retellings, reading guides, and commentary over raw copying. Modern online stories, blog posts, social media posts, and paid material must not be reproduced without clear permission.

Because this is a pilot, untranslated Chinese pages remain available at their original URLs while English pages receive their own stable /en/ URLs.

Midnight Archive

Public-domain tale guides, source checks, and original editorial notes. Every English page keeps a visible source and translation note.
